auth.name: Full name
auth.checkEmailDesc: We just sent a confirmation link to:
auth.checkEmailAction: Click the link in the email to activate your Baakalai account, then come back here to sign in.
auth.resendSuccess: Email resent — check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.verified: Email verified. You can now sign in.
auth.invalidToken: Invalid or expired verification link. Request a new one below.
auth.resetDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists for this address, a reset email has been sent. Check your inbox.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.noProspects: No prospects in this campaign yet
campaigns.noProspectsYet: No prospects yet. Generate some using the panel above or add from the chat.
campaigns.batchPrompt:
You have {count} prospects. Want to launch in batch mode?

OK = Batch mode: send the first {batchSize}, A/B test, then next batch
Cancel = Send all at once
campaigns.startFailed: Auto-start failed ({error}) — start manually from Lemlist
campaigns.noCampaignsDesc: Create your first prospecting campaign. Choose your target, channel, and angle — Baakalai handles the rest.
campaigns.noProjectDesc: Campaigns not assigned to a project
campaigns.noMatchFilter: No campaigns match the selected filter.
campaigns.confirmDelete: Permanently delete "{name}" and all its prospects?
campaigns.optimizeHelpBody: Baakalai analyzes your campaign performance and identifies the lowest-performing touchpoint. It then suggests a new variant you can validate before pushing it to Lemlist as an A/B test.
campaigns.optimizeHelpMemory: Beyond 50 prospects, patterns feed the collective memory
campaigns.confirmArchive: Archive campaign "{name}"? It will remain visible under the "Archived" filter.
campaigns.launchMissingSequenceDesc: Generate sequences first via Baakalai from the Copy & Sequences tab.
campaigns.batchConfirm:
You have {count} prospects. Want to launch in batch mode?

• OK = Batch mode: send the first 100, A/B test, then next batch
• Cancel = Send all at once ({count} prospects)
campaigns.batchModalDesc: You have {count} prospects. How do you want to launch?
campaigns.batchModeDesc: Send the first 100, automatic A/B test, then next batch
campaigns.sendAllDesc: Send all {count} prospects in one go
campaigns.launchFailedDesc: Unknown error — check your Lemlist API key in Integrations.
campaigns.optimizeDeployedDesc: The new A/B test is visible in the A/B Test tab. Stats will arrive after next Lemlist sends.
campaigns.confirmDeleteAll: Delete all {count} prospects from this campaign?
campaigns.revealCannotMsg: Cannot reveal: {errors} contacts don't meet Lemlist criteria (LinkedIn URL OR name + company required).
campaigns.enrichFailedDesc: Unknown error — check your Brave Search API key.

prospectGen.title: Generate prospects
prospectGen.creditsTitle: Remaining Lemlist Leads credits (for email reveal)
prospectGen.csvTitle: Import prospects from a CSV or list
prospectGen.csvHelp: Column email required. Optional: firstName, lastName, name, company, title, linkedinUrl. Delimiter auto-detected (comma, semicolon, tab). Duplicate emails are skipped.
prospectGen.csvMinLines: CSV must contain at least a header line + one data line.
prospectGen.csvEmailNotFound: "email" column not found. Detected headers: {headers}. Expected: email (required) + firstName, lastName, company, title (optional).
prospectGen.csvReadyCount: {count} contact{plural} ready to import (preview of first 5):
prospectGen.stepHelper2: Step 2: uncheck irrelevant ones, then click "Reveal" to get their emails (1 Lemlist credit per contact).
prospectGen.stepHelperRevealing: Lemlist is enriching contacts via its async API. Estimated delay ~20-30 seconds.
prospectGen.stepHelper3: Step 3: check revealed emails then add them to the campaign.
prospectGen.revealCancelled: Reveal cancelled — you can restart manually.
prospectGen.noVerifiedEmail: No contacts with verified email in the selection. Reveal emails first.
prospectGen.diagnosticsTitle: Filters not applied — results may be less relevant
prospectGen.diagnosticsDropped: These criteria were not recognized by Lemlist and were ignored:
prospectGen.revealConfirmBody: This will consume {count} Lemlist Leads credit{plural}.
prospectGen.revealConfirmAsync: Enrichment is asynchronous — estimated delay ~20-30 seconds.
prospectGen.revealCannotValidate: Cannot reveal: Lemlist requires a LinkedIn profile OR (name + company + domain). {errors} contacts don't meet these criteria.

chat.noContactsWeb: No contacts found via web search for these companies.
chat.noValidContacts: No valid contacts (missing email). Make sure the list contains emails.
chat.chooseCampaignForCount: Choose the campaign to add {count} prospects to:
chat.noPrepCampaignsCreate: No campaigns in preparation. Create one first.
chat.noPrepCampaignsChat: No campaigns in preparation. Create a campaign via chat first.
chat.noContactsFound: No contacts found for these criteria.
chat.fallbackBanner: Lemlist Leads unavailable — results via Apollo (automatic fallback).
chat.diagnosticsTitle: Filters not applied — results may be less relevant

memory.title: AI Memory
memory.subtitle: Cross-campaign patterns learned by the AI
memory.applyMsg: Create a campaign applying this pattern:
memory.noPatterns: No patterns discovered yet. Launch campaigns so the AI can learn.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Baakalai!
onboarding.subtitle: Setup {done}/{total}
onboarding.allDone: All set! You can start prospecting.
